dashboard.label: TA-triage Overview
dashboard.description: Starter dashboard for the triage custom search command.

search.query: | makeresults | eval _raw="powershell.exe -enc SQBFAFgA", alert_name="Suspicious PowerShell", src_ip="10.10.10.5", user="alice" | triage model=local context_fields="alert_name,src_ip,user,_raw"
